summary: Frontend-only validation completed on preview URL for the static crowdfunding component showcase. Core sections (Hero, Design System, Campaign, Community, Profile) load and are navigable; responsive checks at desktop/mobile did not show horizontal overflow.

ui_bugs.issue: `data-testid=hero-primary-cta` and `data-testid=hero-secondary-cta` are not present in rendered DOM (count=0). Only link-level test IDs are present.

action_items: Ensure CTA button-level data-testid attributes are attached to actual clickable DOM nodes when using `Button asChild` (or standardize on link-level test IDs and remove non-rendering IDs).
critical_code_review_comments: `Button` with `asChild` currently drops/overrides parent-level `data-testid` values for hero CTAs, which weakens testability consistency for interactive controls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright run passed for section rendering/navigation and responsive overflow checks. One testability gap found: hero button-level data-testid selectors not present in DOM; link-level selectors work.
rca of the issue: RCA: Hero CTA buttons use shadcn `Button` with `asChild`, and the nested `<a>` also defines its own `data-testid`. In rendered output, parent button test IDs are not discoverable (likely prop merge/override behavior through Slot composition). Repro: query selector count for [data-testid='hero-primary-cta'] returns 0 while [data-testid='hero-primary-cta-link'] exists and is clickable. Mitigation: keep test ID only on final interactive DOM node (anchor) or ensure parent prop forwarding strategy preserves intended test ID.
